steps.title: Identify corresponding angles
steps.content: Lines $m$ and $n$ are parallel, and line $t$ is a transversal. The angle marked $134^{\circ}$ and the angle marked $w^{\circ}$ are in corresponding positions.

steps.title: Use the parallel lines
steps.content: Corresponding angles formed by a transversal crossing parallel lines are congruent: +$$w^{\circ}=134^{\circ}$$ +$$w=134$$ +The answer is D.
